column1: # Partition table for UberSDR CYD (4 MB flash).
# Identical to the framework's min_spiffs.csv except the coredump partition
# is replaced by "usercfg": a raw 64 KB region the web flasher writes WiFi +
# UberSDR settings into (magic + length + JSON). The firmware imports it into
# NVS on first boot and erases it — see importFlasherConfig() in settings.cpp.
